ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* City name of the airport */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the airport in mph */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the airport in miles */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "airport_code" TEXT /* Code of the airport (e.g., ORD, LAX, JFK) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that was delayed */,
  "carrier_delay" TEXT /* Delay caused by the carrier */,
  "weather_delay" TEXT /* Delay caused by weather */,
  "nas_delay" TEXT /* Delay caused by NAS (National Airspace System) */,
  "security_delay" TEXT /* Delay caused by security */,
  "late_aircraft_delay" TEXT /* Delay caused by late aircraft */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_code" TEXT /* Code for the delay (e.g., weather, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., federal, state, religious) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the flight operates */,
  "crs_dep_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "crs_arr_time" INTEGER /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "schedule_season" TEXT /* Season of the year the schedule is valid (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., airline staff, airport administrator, regulatory authority) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., operations, maintenance) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user (e.g., pilot, mechanic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the flight */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Number of the flight (e.g., DL123) */,
  "departure_terminal" TEXT /* Departure terminal */,
  "arrival_terminal" TEXT /* Arrival terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature at the airport in Fahrenheit */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the airport in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the airport in mph */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)
column_names: Wind speed at the airport in mph
Visibility at the airport in miles
Code of the airport (e.g., ORD, LAX, JFK)
